ddls:
CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Exact time of the price data */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of LINK in USDT */,
  "high" REAL /* High price for the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price for the day */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price for the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price for the day */,
  "changes" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "changes_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., LINK, USDT) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain platform used by the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "base_crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base cryptocurrency */,
  "quote_crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading pair */,
  "fee" REAL /* Trading fee for the pair */,
  "min_order_size" REAL /* Minimum order size for the pair */,
  "max_order_size" REAL /* Maximum order size for the pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_quote_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_base_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp for the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_insights" (
  "insight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market insight */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "insight_date" TEXT /* Date of the insight */,
  "insight_type" TEXT /* Type of the insight (e.g., trend, volatility) */,
  "insight_data" TEXT /* Data and details of the insight */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the insight */,
  "insight_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the insight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_insights_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active or inactive) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (buy or sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the base cryptocurrency traded */,
  "total" REAL /* Total value of the trade */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss price for the trade */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take-profit price for the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (buy or sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the base cryptocurrency traded */,
  "total" REAL /* Total value of the trade */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was closed */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the API key */,
  "api_source" TEXT /* Source of the API (e.g., Binance, CoinGecko) */,
  "key" TEXT /* API key */,
  "secret" TEXT /* API secret */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the API key (active or inactive) */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the API key (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp for the API key */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp for the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "api_source" TEXT /* Source of the API (e.g., Binance, CoinGecko) */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint URL for the integration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Date of the last successful sync */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (active, inactive, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message content of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
